examples: Perhaps he had slightly misled them, but it was quite unintentional.
Parents shouldn't keep scolding their child for his unintentional mistakes.
But the fact that such a violation is "unintentional" does not excuse the misconduct.
But it's the second unintentional irony of all this queuing that is even more delicious.
First, CXO may have had a grading bias derived from some unintentional animus toward gurus.
